title: chore(deps): bump hono from 4.11.3 to 4.11.4 in /observability/_examples/otel-bridge/hono-multi

similarOrDuplicatePRs.title: chore(deps): bump hono from 4.11.3 to 4.11.4
similarOrDuplicatePRs.relation: related — same hono bump but scoped to root

summary: Dependabot bumps hono from 4.11.3 to 4.11.7 (resolved version) in the observability examples directory (otel-bridge/hono-multi). Changes span 3 package.json files and the pnpm-lock.yaml. The hono 4.11.4 release includes a security fix for JWT algorithm confusion in JWT and JWK/JWKS middleware (GHSA-f67f-6cw9-8mq4, GHSA-3vhc-576x-3qv4). This only affects example code, not published packages.
maintainerNotes: Low-risk automated dependency bump in an examples-only directory. The 'Full Test Suite' check shows fail but all individual checks pass — likely a flaky or unrelated failure. PR #11903 is a related open dependabot PR bumping hono in the root scope. No merge conflicts. Consider merging both hono bump PRs together or closing this one if #11903 covers the same lockfile changes. Since this is examples-only code, no changeset is needed.
